title: ODPA joins global push to tackle harm of AI images
description: GUERNSEY’S Office of the Data Protection Authority has been at the forefront of dozens of similar bodies from all over the world coming together to address the potential harms of images produced using artificial intelligence.
content:
‘It’s an indication that AI-generated imagery, especially when it comes to deepfakes, is a global risk that demands a global response,’ said data protection commissioner Brent Homan.

title: AI won't kill jobs, but your next role may not exist yet
description: Amid growing concerns about job losses and automation, a new report suggests that artificial intelligence will transform the workforce by reshaping job roles, accelerating the need for reskilling, and creating new career opportunities, rather than triggering widespread unemployment.
content: The conversation around artificial intelligence has become increasingly urgent and increasingly anxious. Headlines warn of white-collar professionals being replaced, industries hollowed out, and careers made obsolete overnight. For many workers, the ... [8463 chars]

title: Sam Altman says 'don't listen to old people': Trust AI or experience on career?
description: Artificial Intelligence is revolutionising how we learn, work, and make decisions by compressing decades of knowledge into seconds. But experts warn that AI cannot replace the power of human mentorship, judgment, and real-world experience, skills essential for ethical decision-making, effective leadership, and long-term career growth in today’s AI-driven world.
content:
For decades, success followed a clear and comforting formula: learn from those who came before you, follow their proven path, and repeat what worked. The roadmap was already drawn; all you had to do was walk it well.
